properties.regex: ^Element '(?P<element>[^']+)', attribute '(?P<attribute>[^']+)': The attribute '(?:[^']+)' is not allowed\.$

properties.fix_advice_template: Change '{attribute}' on {element} from '{invalid_value}' to a value allowed by {type_name}.
properties.regex: ^Element '(?P<element>[^']+)', attribute '(?P<attribute>[^']+)': '(?P<invalid_value>[^']+)' is not a valid value of the (?:union )?type '(?P<type_name>[^']+)'\.$
^Element '(?P<element>[^']+)': The attribute '(?P<attribute>[^']+)' is required but missing\.$
^Element '(?P<element>[^']+)': Missing child element\(s\)\. Expected is(?P<one_of> one of)? \( (?P<expected_text>[^)]+) \)\.$

properties.fix_advice_template: Check the root element name and XML namespace on {element} so they match the schema.
properties.regex: ^Element '(?P<element>[^']+)': No matching global declaration available for the validation root\.$

properties.fix_advice_template: Replace, move, or remove {element}. The schema expected {expected_text} at this location.
properties.regex: ^Element '(?P<element>[^']+)': This element is not expected\. Expected is(?: one of)? \( (?P<expected_text>[^)]+) \)\.$

properties.fix_advice_template: Move {element} after the required earlier child element(s): {expected_text}.
properties.regex: ^Element '(?P<element>[^']+)': This element is not expected\. Expected is(?: one of)? \( (?P<expected_text>[^)]+) \)\.$

Single value constraint inside a ConstraintGroup. It compares a String-valued candidate against the supplied rule and value.
Deterministic multi-parameter branch containing one or more ParameterValueSet entries.
Global variable-action branch. Exactly one of SetAction or ModifyAction must be selected for the referenced variable.
semantic_constraints: Select exactly one of: SetAction, ModifyAction.

properties.description: Variable-based value condition. It compares the referenced variable's String-valued content using the supplied rule and value.
semantic_constraints: variableRef must point at a declared scenario variable.
